data.title: Elizabeth Schneider named VP of Partner Channel Sales at Fusion Connect to drive growth and enhance partner experience.
data.description: Fusion Connect has appointed a new Channel Chief, Elizabeth Schneider, to drive growth and enhance the partner experience. The company, a top provider of cloud communication solutions known for its exceptional customer service, made the announcement on July 31, 2025. Schneider's promotion aims to accelerate Fusion's growth trajectory and elevate the overall partner experience. This strategic move underscores Fusion Connect's commitment to further expanding its market presence and solidifying its position as a leader in the industry.

data.title: MetroWall breaks ground on new HQ in Congers, NY, to double size by late 2026, boosting production and R&D capabilities.
data.description: In Congers, NY, MetroWall has revealed plans for a new headquarters adjacent to its current location. The groundbreaking for the state-of-the-art building took place recently, set to be completed by late 2026. The new facility, double the size of the current headquarters, signifies the company's growth and dedication to innovation and local manufacturing. This expansion will boost MetroWall's manufacturing capacity and feature a specialized Research & Development department.

data.title: IDrive Backup earns ISO 27001:2022 certification for data security, a globally recognized standard.
data.description: On July 31, 2025, in Los Angeles, IDrive, a prominent provider of cloud backup and storage services, proudly announced its attainment of ISO 27001:2022 certification. This certification signifies compliance with the global standard for Information Security Management Systems (ISMS). This accomplishment showcases IDrive's commitment to ensuring the security and integrity of data.

data.title: INELDA celebrates 10 years of transforming end-of-life care globally. Leading nonprofit in doula experience.
data.description: In the city of Jersey City, New Jersey, INELDA, the International End-of-Life Doula Association, a prominent global nonprofit organization specializing in end-of-life doula services, is commemorating its tenth year since inception. Established in July 31, 2015, INELDA has been at the forefront of enhancing the end-of-life experience for individuals worldwide. This milestone signifies a decade of dedication to providing compassionate care and support during this significant stage of life.

data.title: AUGA group, RAB facilitates voting ballot for shareholders' meeting on 12 Aug 2025 to approve draft restructuring plan.
data.description: On July 21, 2025, AUGA group, AB, a company under restructuring with the code 126264360 and based at Konstitucijos pr. 21C, Vilnius, announced the convening of a General Meeting of shareholders on August 12, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. The purpose of the meeting is for shareholders to vote on the approval of the Company's draft restructuring plan.

data.title: Whales obtained 1% of circulating BTC in last 4 months, also branching into alternative cryptos amidst market uncertainties.
data.description: In the past few months, large Bitcoin holders have acquired close to 1% of the total circulating supply of BTC. These "whales" have been expanding their portfolios by investing in other cryptocurrencies as well, indicating a strategy of diversification. This trend comes at a time when the market shows conflicting signals, showcasing the evolving landscape of digital asset investments.

data.title: Agrace to take over hospice program at Crossing Rivers Health, Wisconsin's largest nonprofit hospice. #partnership
data.description: In Prairie du Chien, Wisconsin on July 31, 2025, Agrace, the state's leading nonprofit hospice provider, has revealed a collaboration with Crossing Rivers Health to acquire the health system's hospice initiative. This collaboration marks an essential step in their partnership, as the two entities have solidified a Preferred Partner agreement.

data.title: Trek Bicycle to use low-emission aluminum in frames starting Oct 2025, sourced from eco-friendly facilities.
data.description: In Waterloo, Wisconsin, as of July 31, 2025, it has been announced that beginning in October 2025, a significant change will take place in the production of aluminum bicycle frames. Companies such as Trek, Electra, and Diamant will transition to using aluminum sourced from facilities powered by renewable energy or incorporating recycled materials for nearly all their bicycle frames. This shift towards sustainable sourcing will have a notable impact on the environmental footprint of the industry.

data.title: Money2, the emerging financial system with $225 billion in stablecoins, is reshaping value transfer through DeFi and code-based contracts.
data.description: Money2, a recently introduced financial system driven by stablecoins and decentralized finance (DeFi), is revolutionizing the transfer of value. With a staggering $225 billion invested in stablecoins and automated contracts overtaking traditional banking systems, Money2 is reshaping the financial landscape.
